Acknowledgements and Contacts

Funding

  • CINECA IscrB_SuReVaNN, CNHPC_1491856, HyChall_HP10CSTDW6 projects

Acknowledgements

  • Professors S. Garashchuk, and the Quantum Theory Group (University of South Carolina)

Contacts
